name: Hillbilly
description: Fixin' to deploy this thing, hold my beer
verbs: Hold my beer and watch this
Happier than a dead pig in sunshine
Lord willin' and the creek don't rise
Rode hard and put up wet
Useless as a screen door on a sub
Hotter than a goat in a pepper patch
If it ain't broke don't fix it
More nervous than a long-tailed cat
